tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "DENY-DNS-Tunneling"
        set uuid d4618e14-32b1-51f1-bca9-a1a498d3741b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Block DNS tunneling to attacker C2 203.0.113.1"
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show full-configuration firewall policy 2
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set status enable
        set name "DENY-DNS-Tunneling"
        set uuid d4618e14-32b1-51f1-bca9-a1a498d3741b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set ztna-status disable
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set internet-service disable
        set internet-service-src disable
        unset reputation-minimum
        set rtp-nat disable
        set schedule "always"
        set schedule-timeout disable
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set tos-mask 0x00
        set anti-replay enable
        set logtraffic all
        set logtraffic-start disable
        set session-ttl 0
        set vlan-cos-fwd 255
set vlan-cos-rev 255
        set fec disable
        set wccp disable
        set natip 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0
        set match-vip disable
        set tcp-mss-sender 0
        set tcp-mss-receiver 0
        set comments "Block DNS tunneling to attacker C2 203.0.113.1"
        set block-notification disable
        set replacemsg-override-group ''
        set srcaddr-negate disable
        set dstaddr-negate disable
        set service-negate disable
        set captive-portal-exempt disable
        set dsri disable
        set radius-mac-auth-bypass disable
        set delay-tcp-npu-session disable
        unset vlan-filter
        set send-deny-packet disable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show full-configuration firewall policy 2
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set status enable
        set name "DENY-DNS-Tunneling"
        set uuid d4618e14-32b1-51f1-bca9-a1a498d3741b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set ztna-status disable
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set internet-service disable
        set internet-service-src disable
        unset reputation-minimum
        set rtp-nat disable
        set schedule "always"
        set schedule-timeout disable
        set service "DNS-8853-UDP" "DNS-8853-TCP"
        set tos-mask 0x00
        set anti-replay enable
        set logtraffic all
        set logtraffic-start disable
        set session-ttl 0
        set vlan-cos-fwd 255
set vlan-cos-rev 255
        set fec disable
        set wccp disable
        set natip 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0
        set match-vip disable
        set tcp-mss-sender 0
        set tcp-mss-receiver 0
        set comments "Block DNS tunneling to attacker C2 203.0.113.1"
        set block-notification disable
        set replacemsg-override-group ''
        set srcaddr-negate disable
        set dstaddr-negate disable
        set service-negate disable
        set captive-portal-exempt disable
        set dsri disable
        set radius-mac-auth-bypass disable
        set delay-tcp-npu-session disable
        unset vlan-filter
        set send-deny-packet disable
    next
end
